src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Remove the @EnableEurekaClient annotation to decouple the application from Netflix Eureka service discovery.
Remove the unused import for Spring Cloud Circuit Breaker.
Remove the unused import for Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka.
Added import for HttpStatus to support explicit status code setting in response.
Changed the endpoint return type from a primitive Double to a CurrencyConversion object to provide richer data.
Updated the response construction to return the full CurrencyConversion object instead of just the conversion factor.
Added a log statement to print the conversion factor value before returning the response.
Removed the getDataFallBack method which was likely a circuit breaker fallback or unused utility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.17 to 3.2.7 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Cloud dependencies from 2021.0.8 to 2023.0.0 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x.
Explicitly pin Lombok version to 1.18.30 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Removed Spring Cloud Config client configuration to decouple from external config server.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Deleted the 'cloud' block containing config discovery settings.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Removed Eureka client configuration to stop service registration with Eureka.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Deleted the 'eureka' block containing client service URL and region settings.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Exposed all Spring Boot Actuator endpoints via web interface.
